name: Equinox Gold Corp.
description: Equinox Gold Corp. is a Canadian gold producer with a diversified portfolio of operating mines and development projects across the Americas. The company operates the Valentine and Greenstone mines in Canada, the Mesquite mine in California, and the El Limón and Libertad mines in Nicaragua, targeting annual production of 700,000–800,000 ounces of gold. Near-term organic growth is underpinned by the Valentine Phase 2 expansion, Castle Mountain Phase 2 in California, and a potential restart and expansion of the Los Filos mine in Mexico.
